mfa.webauthnError: Passkey verification failed. Please try again.
mfa.webauthnCancelled: Verification was cancelled. Click below to try again.
mfa.webauthnDisabledMidFlow: Passkeys have been disabled by an administrator. Please sign in again.
mfa.enterRecoveryCode: Enter one of your recovery codes
mfa.mustEnrollMfa: Your administrator requires multi-factor authentication. Please set up at least one MFA method to continue.

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least {min} characters

aimerIntegration.title: Aimer Integration
aimerIntegration.description: Configure the system-wide prerequisites for the Send to Aimer flow: the deployment identifier (aice_id), the aimer-web bridge URL, and the dedicated context-token signing keypair.

permissionAlert.title: Aimer signing key file has unexpected permissions
permissionAlert.body: The on-disk file ({path}) was observed with mode {observed} instead of 0600. Restore the correct mode (chmod 0600) before continuing — the application refuses to write a key with looser permissions, but reading remains possible.

setupStatus.title: Setup status
setupStatus.description: Aimer integration is system-wide. All three prerequisites must be configured before the Send to Aimer button becomes operational.

missing.signingKey: Context-token signing keypair is not generated.

signingKey.title: Context-token signing keypair
signingKey.description: ES256 keypair used to sign Aimer context tokens. Separate from the JWT and mTLS keys so trust domains stay independent. Compare the thumbprint shown here with the value displayed on aimer-web's environment registration screen before approving the registration.
signingKey.emptyDescription: No keypair has been generated yet. Generate one to start the trust-establishment flow.

fields.thumbprintBase64UrlHelper: 43 characters, no padding. Use this value when comparing against aimer-web — it is the canonical form.
fields.thumbprintHexColonsHelper: Same SHA-256 rendered as 64 hex characters in 4-byte blocks. Visual aid for verbal/mental comparison.
fields.publicJwkHelper: Public key only. The private key never leaves the server.

rotation.body: Recommended rotation date: {date}. Use Rotate to mint a new pending kid, then Switch once aimer-web's trust registry has been updated.

switch.guidanceBody: Before switching, transmit the new kid's thumbprint out-of-band and register it on aimer-web's trust registry. Switching before registration causes context tokens signed by the new kid to be rejected.
switch.confirmCheckbox: I confirmed the new kid has been registered on aimer-web's trust registry.

rotateConfirm.title: Mint a new pending kid?
rotateConfirm.body: A new ES256 keypair will be generated and stored alongside the active kid. The active kid keeps signing tokens until you Switch.

switchConfirm.title: Switch to the new kid?
switchConfirm.body: The pending kid will become active and the previous kid will be retained briefly for in-flight context-token verification on aimer-web. This action takes effect immediately.

deactivateConfirm.title: Deactivate previous kid?
deactivateConfirm.body: The previous kid's private key will be removed from disk. aimer-web continues to verify pre-switch tokens against its own trust registry independently.

settings.title: System settings
settings.description: These settings identify this AICE instance to aimer-web and tell it where to deliver context tokens.
settings.aiceIdHelper: Deployment hostname (RFC 1123). Used as the JWT iss claim and as the aice_id claim sent to aimer-web. Aimer-web's trust_registry uses this as the lookup key, so it must match the value registered there.
settings.bridgeUrlHelper: Base URL of the aimer-web instance whose /api/auth/bridge endpoint receives the multipart POST. HTTPS only. The path is normalized to a canonical form (no trailing slash).

effectWarning.title: Re-registration required after this change
effectWarning.body:
After this change, the operator must re-register this environment on aimer-web. Existing registrations are invalidated and any context tokens issued in the interim will be rejected.

Continue?

customerExternalKey.note: external_key is a per-customer setting and does not affect system-wide setup status. The Send to Aimer button is independently disabled per customer until each customer's external_key is populated.

errors.actionFailed: Operation failed. See the error toast for details and retry.

success.rotate: Pending kid generated. Register it on aimer-web's trust registry, then Switch.
success.switch: Switched to the new kid. Aimer-web should already accept the new kid before Switch.
success.settingSaved: Setting saved. Re-register this environment on aimer-web.

forbidden.title: 403 — Forbidden
forbidden.description: Your account does not have the permissions required to view Node management. Both nodes:read and services:read are required.

list.noResults: No nodes match the current filter.
list.pendingSummary: {count, plural, =0 {No pending changes} one {# node with pending changes} other {# nodes with pending changes}}
list.search: Search by name, hostname, or customer
list.deleteConfirmDescription: {hostname} will be removed permanently. This action cannot be undone.
list.deleteBulkConfirmDescription: The selected nodes will be removed permanently. This action cannot be undone.
list.deleteError: Some nodes could not be deleted.

managerUnavailable.title: Cannot reach manager
managerUnavailable.description: The manager (review-web) is unreachable. Nodes cannot be listed or modified until the connection is restored.

status.staleHint: Last updated {time} (stale — waiting for the next refresh)
status.restartConfirmDescription: {hostname} will be restarted now. Active connections will be interrupted.
status.shutdownConfirmDescription: {hostname} will be shut down now. The node will not come back up automatically.
status.controlError: The action could not be completed.

tooltips.deadNode: Node has not responded; service status forced off
tooltips.absent: Service is not configured on this node

detail.title: Node detail
detail.placeholder: The full node detail dashboard, including the Apply All Pending action, will be delivered in Phase Node-5.

charts.samplesLabel: {samples, plural, one {Last # sample} other {Last # samples}} · ~{minutes} min

controls.restartConfirmDescription: {hostname} will be restarted now. Active connections will be interrupted.
controls.shutdownConfirmDescription: {hostname} will be shut down now. The node will not come back up automatically.
controls.applyAllConfirmDescription: Pending drafts on this node will be applied to the manager and any external services.
controls.deleteConfirmDescription: {hostname} will be removed permanently. This action cannot be undone.
controls.controlError: The action could not be completed.
controls.deleteError: The node could not be deleted.

services.heading: Services
services.unsupervisedNote: This service has no UI-editable config.
services.appliedEmpty: No applied configuration for this service.
services.draftEmpty: No pending draft for this service.
services.diffEmpty: No pending changes for this service.

externalUnreachable.applied: This service is currently unreachable; applied configuration cannot be read.
externalUnreachable.diff: Diff cannot be computed while the service is unreachable.

managerOffline.title: Cannot reach manager
managerOffline.description: The node detail page cannot load while the manager is unreachable.

applyPreview.title: Apply preview
applyPreview.description: Review the dispatches the BFF will run before confirming. Only the dispatch sequence is shown — internal review-web steps are not.
applyPreview.loadFailed: Could not build the apply plan.
applyPreview.retryableHeading: A dispatch failed; retry it from this row, or rebuild the preview to start over.
applyPreview.noPendingChanges: There are no pending changes to apply.

dialog.manualCard: This service reads its configuration from a local TOML file on the node; aice-web-next cannot inspect or edit it.

errors.nameTaken: A node with this name already exists.
errors.hostnameTaken: A node with this hostname already exists.

stale.title: The node was modified by someone else

common.emptyListHint: Leave all checked to enable everything; leave none checked to disable.

errors.invalid: Port must be an integer between 0 and 65535.

unsupervisedEngine.title: Unsupervised Engine
unsupervisedEngine.description: This service reads its configuration from a local TOML file on the node; aice-web-next cannot inspect or edit it.

customers.title: Customers
customers.name: Name
customers.externalKeyHelp: Enter a globally unique business identifier pre-agreed with the aimer-web System Administrator. Recommended: a domain (e.g. acmecorp.com), business registration number, or contract code. The agreement must be made over an out-of-band secure channel (in-house SSO messenger, in person, etc.). An incorrect value will be rejected on the first bridge attempt with bridge_customer_mismatch. After entering, ask the operator to run a single bridge test to verify the mapping. Read more:
customers.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this customer? This will permanently remove the customer database.
customers.deleteLinked: Cannot delete customer with active account assignments.
customers.externalKeyConflict: external_key is already in use by another customer.
customers.externalKeyChangeBody: external_key is the customer mapping identifier with aimer-web. After this change, aimer-web's matching customer must also be updated to keep the mapping intact. A bridge test is recommended right after. Continue?
customers.externalKeyClearBody: Clearing this customer's external_key disables Send to Aimer for this customer until it is set again, and any existing mapping with aimer-web's matching customer is no longer reachable from this side. Continue?

scope.sourceEmpty: No customers are assigned to this account.
scope.callout: Showing data across {count} customers. Click the customer indicator above for details.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to disable this account? The account will be deactivated and all active sessions will be invalidated.
accounts.lastSysAdmin: This is the last System Administrator and cannot be deleted.
accounts.mfaResetDescription: Remove all MFA methods and recovery codes for this account. The user will need to re-enroll if MFA is required.

totp.title: Two-Factor Authentication
totp.description: Add an extra layer of security to your account using an authenticator app.
totp.notAllowed: TOTP is not allowed by the current security policy.
totp.disabledByAdmin: TOTP is registered but has been disabled by an administrator.
totp.scanQrCode: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app
totp.enterManualKey: Can't scan? Enter this key manually
totp.verifyCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to verify setup
totp.invalidCode: Invalid verification code. Please try again.
totp.setupError: Failed to start TOTP setup. Please try again.
totp.alreadyEnrolled: TOTP is already set up on this account.
totp.confirmDisableDescription: This will remove two-factor authentication from your account. You will need to set it up again to re-enable it.
totp.disableError: Failed to disable TOTP. Please try again.

webauthn.title: Passkeys
webauthn.description: Register passkeys for passwordless sign-in verification.
webauthn.disabledByAdmin: Passkeys are registered but have been disabled by an administrator.
webauthn.registerDescription: Follow your browser's prompt to register a passkey.
webauthn.registerError: Failed to register passkey. Please try again.
webauthn.removeDescription: Are you sure you want to remove "{name}"? You will no longer be able to use this passkey for sign-in.
webauthn.removeError: Failed to remove passkey. Please try again.
webauthn.renameError: Failed to rename passkey. Please try again.

recovery.title: Recovery Codes
recovery.description: Recovery codes can be used to sign in if you lose access to your authenticator.
recovery.fetchError: Failed to load recovery code status.
recovery.generateDescription: This will invalidate all existing recovery codes.
recovery.codesDescription: Save these codes in a safe place.
recovery.saveWarning: Save these codes in a safe place. You won't be able to see them again.
recovery.generateError: Failed to generate recovery codes. Please try again.

systemSettings.readOnlyNotice: You do not have permission to modify these settings.

passwordPolicy.title: Password Policy
passwordPolicy.description: Configure password requirements for all accounts.
passwordPolicy.complexityEnabledDescription: Require uppercase, lowercase, digit, and special character
passwordPolicy.reuseBanCountDescription: Number of previous passwords that cannot be reused (0–24)

sessionPolicy.title: Session Policy
sessionPolicy.idleTimeoutMinutesDescription: Minutes of inactivity before session expires (1–1440)
sessionPolicy.absoluteTimeoutHoursDescription: Maximum session duration regardless of activity (1–720)
sessionPolicy.maxSessionsDescription: Maximum concurrent sessions per account (leave empty for unlimited)

lockoutPolicy.title: Lockout Policy
lockoutPolicy.description: Configure account lockout after failed sign-in attempts.
lockoutPolicy.stage1ThresholdDescription: Number of failed attempts before lockout (1–100)

jwtPolicy.title: JWT Policy
jwtPolicy.accessTokenExpirationMinutesDescription: Token lifetime before re-authentication is required (1–60)

rateLimits.title: Rate Limits
rateLimits.description: Configure rate limiting for sign-in and API requests.
rateLimits.perIpCountDescription: Max sign-in attempts per IP address

roles.title: Roles
roles.name: Name
roles.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this role? This action cannot be undone.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.placeholder: Detection events will be displayed here.
dashboard.noPermission: You do not have permission to view the dashboard.

activeSessions.title: Active Sessions
activeSessions.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke this session? The user will be signed out immediately.

lockedAccounts.title: Locked & Suspended Accounts
lockedAccounts.unlockConfirm: Are you sure you want to unlock this account? The account will become active immediately.
lockedAccounts.restoreConfirm: Are you sure you want to restore this suspended account? The account will become active immediately.

alerts.title: Suspicious Activity
alerts.description: Security alerts detected in the last 24 hours

messages.account_lockout: {count} account lockout(s) in the last 24 hours

presets.savedEmpty: Save a filter to keep it here.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete saved filter?
deleteConfirm.description: {name} will be removed from your saved filters. This cannot be undone.
deleteConfirm.error: Could not delete the saved filter.

renameDialog.title: Rename saved filter
renameDialog.description: Choose a new name for this saved filter.

errors.duplicate: You already have a saved filter with this name.
errors.server: Could not rename the saved filter.
errors.unauthenticated: Sign in again to manage saved filters.

saveFilterDialog.title: Save this filter
saveFilterDialog.description: Saved filters appear in the Presets menu and can be loaded later.

errors.duplicate: You already have a saved filter with this name.
errors.unauthenticated: Sign in again to save filters.

filters.drawerDescription: Narrow the detection results by period, time range, and categorical filters. Apply commits the filter and runs the query.

customer.label: Customer
customer.loadingHint: Fetching the customer list from the detection backend.

sensor.label: Sensor
sensor.empty: No sensors available for your customer scope.
sensor.comingSoonHint: Sensor options become available once REview publishes the sensor-list endpoint.
sensor.loadingHint: Fetching the sensor list from the detection backend.

filters.saveThisFilterDisabled: Saving is unavailable in this view.
filters.invalidRange: End must be later than start.
filters.resultsCount: {count} detection events match the current filter.
filters.resultsForbiddenScope: This filter references a customer outside your access. Remove the unavailable customers and retry.

endpoint.label: Network / IP
endpoint.panelDescription: Add single IPs, ranges, or CIDR networks and choose a direction per entry.
endpoint.savedHelp: Saved network/IP groups are not yet available in this version.
endpoint.invalidInput: Enter a valid IP, range, or CIDR.

ZZ.label: Location database unavailable
ZZ.searchAliases: unavailable geoip database missing no database

results.downloadErrorDescription: The detection service failed to produce the CSV. Try again, or narrow the filter.
results.downloadForbiddenScopeDescription: This export references a customer outside your access. Remove the unavailable customers and retry.
results.downloadLimitExceededDescription: The current filter matches {count} detection events, which exceeds the {limit}-row export limit. Narrow the filter before retrying.

exportConfirm.title: Export a large result set?
exportConfirm.description: The current filter matches {count} detection events (about {size}). Large exports take several minutes and use more memory on this device. Continue, cancel, or narrow the filter first.

results.peekLostNotice: This event is no longer in the list.
results.loadingDescription: Fetching detection events from the backend.
results.errorDescription: The detection service did not respond. Try again, or refine the filter.
results.emptyResultsDescription: No detection events match the current filter. Loosen the filter or pick a wider time range.
results.emptyFilterDescription: Open the filter drawer and pick a time range to see detection events.
results.rowOpenLabel: Open Quick peek for this event

analytics.loadingDescription: Fetching the Top N counts and the event frequency series for the active filter.
analytics.errorDescription: The analytics service failed to respond. Please retry.
analytics.forbiddenDescription: Your account doesn't have permission to view detection analytics.
analytics.forbiddenScopeDescription: The active filter references a customer outside your access. Remove the unavailable customers and retry.
analytics.emptyDescription: The active filter doesn't match any events in the selected time range.

quickPeek.openInvestigationTooltip: Open the full investigation view in this tab (middle-click or Cmd/Ctrl-click to open in a new tab).

tabs.newTabAtCap: Close a tab to open a new one (maximum 8 open).

pivot.tabCapReached: Close a tab to pivot — already at the {max}-tab limit.

notFound.invalidTokenBody: This investigation URL is malformed or has been tampered with. Go back to Detection and open the event from the list.
notFound.notFoundBody: We could not find an event matching this link. It may have aged out of retention, or its addressing information may have changed.
notFound.fetchErrorBody: We were unable to contact the detection service. Please try again in a moment.
notFound.forbiddenBody: You do not have permission to view this event. If you believe this is a mistake, contact your administrator.

header.multipleNotice: Multiple events match this link; showing one. Open the full result list for the complete set.

overview.aimerBody: Send this event to Aimer for AI analysis. You'll be asked to sign in at aimer-web, approve the data transfer, and the result will be shown there.
overview.aimerNoCustomerTooltip: This event has no connected customer; it cannot be sent to Aimer.
overview.aimerCustomerIneligibleTooltip: This customer has no external_key. Set it on the Customers page.
overview.aimerSetupTooltip: Aimer integration must be configured by a System Administrator.
overview.aimerModalBodySingle: Send this event (customer {name}) to Aimer. The same customer permission is required at aimer-web.
overview.aimerModalBodyMulti: Pick the customer to send this event under. The same customer permission is required at aimer-web.
overview.aimerErrorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
overview.aimerErrorRateLimited: Too many Send to Aimer requests. Please retry shortly.
overview.aimerErrorNotConfigured: Aimer integration is not configured. Ask a System Administrator.
overview.aimerErrorExternalKeyMissing: This customer has no external_key. Set it on the Customers page.
overview.aimerErrorEventNotFound: This event is no longer accessible under the selected customer.

protocol.noFields: No kind-specific fields are available for this event type.

payload.title: Captured payload
payload.description: Application payload bytes captured with this event. The detection service does not expose raw packet capture yet; for HTTP events this is the HTTP body stream. Use the download action to save the bytes for offline analysis.

related.note: Pivots use only filter-based lookups — no external AI insight is fetched.

triage.title: Triage
triage.intro: Baseline scoring over events in the selected period. Phase 1.A only — corpus retention isn't yet available, so the period is restricted to the last 30 days.
triage.errorBanner: Could not load events for this period. Try a different range.
triage.forbiddenBanner: You are not authorized to view triage results.
triage.forbiddenScopeBanner: You have no customers in scope. Contact an administrator.
triage.truncatedBannerTemplate: Partial: showing {loaded} events of period (truncated at {cap}).
triage.clampedNotice: Period adjusted to fit the last 30 days.

periodPicker.lookbackHint: Start cannot be earlier than 30 days ago.

assetList.title: Assets by score
assetList.empty: No assets matched the baseline rule in this period.

assetDetail.title: Asset detail
assetDetail.emptySelection: Select an asset to inspect its events.

pivotPanel.title: Related events
pivotPanel.empty: No related events for the dimensions this asset carries.
pivotPanel.truncatedHint: Some matches may be missing — only the first {cap} events of the period are loaded.
pivotPanel.noFocusHint: Select an asset to see its related events.

periodChangeConfirm.title: Discard pivot trail?
periodChangeConfirm.description: Changing the period will reload the corpus and clear your current pivot trail. Continue?

scopeToggle.tier1Hint: Pivot only over events that already passed the baseline rule (the loaded corpus).
scopeToggle.tier2Hint: Server-filtered dimensions trigger a fresh fetch on click. Larger projections will ask for confirmation.

tier2.weakBadgeHint: Found by Tier 2 fetch and not present in the loaded corpus.
tier2.evictionTemplate: Cache full — evicted {dimension}: {value}. Re-pivoting will refetch.
tier2.errorFallbackMessage: REview did not return a message.

prefetchModal.title: Fetch large result set?
prefetchModal.descriptionTemplate: This dimension projects to {count} events, above the {threshold} threshold. The fetch may take a while.
prefetchModal.descriptionApproximateTemplate: Projected size could not be verified — the first page returned at least {count} events, but the total against the {threshold} threshold is unknown. Confirming continues the fetch up to the per-dimension cap.
prefetchModal.descriptionUnknown: Projected size is unknown; the fetch will walk pages until it finds the cap or the end.

tier2.sameSensorUnavailable: Requires a sensor index — Tier 2 sensor pivot is unavailable until a triage:read-compatible lookup ships.

triage.staleHashFallback: Pivot trail in the URL no longer matches the loaded period — showing the asset root.

changePassword.heading: Change Password
changePassword.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait and try again.
changePassword.serverError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

errors.TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least {min} characters
errors.MISSING_UPPERCASE: Password must contain an uppercase letter
errors.MISSING_LOWERCASE: Password must contain a lowercase letter
errors.MISSING_SPECIAL: Password must contain a special character
errors.BLOCKLISTED: This password is too common. Please choose a different one.

triagePolicies.title: Triage Policies
triagePolicies.subtitle: User-authored matching rules applied per customer.
triagePolicies.noCustomerScope: No customers are available in your scope.
triagePolicies.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
triagePolicies.noResults: No triage policies for this customer yet.
triagePolicies.name: Name
triagePolicies.packetAttrHelp: JSON array of packet_attr rules. IP/CIDR (value_kind=ipaddr) values and range cmp_kinds (open_range / close_range / left_open_range / right_open_range and their not_* variants) are validated server-side.
triagePolicies.deleteConfirm: Delete triage policy '{name}'? This cannot be undone.

triageExclusions.globalSubtitle: Apply to every active customer. Future cadence ticks honor these exclusions; past corpus rows are deleted retroactively when the global ADD's per-customer fanout completes.
triageExclusions.customerSubtitle: Per-customer exclusion rules. New rules take effect immediately and remove matching corpus rows under the cadence advisory lock.
triageExclusions.noCustomerScope: No customers are available in your scope.
triageExclusions.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
triageExclusions.valueIpHelper: Single IP or CIDR; e.g. 192.168.1.0/24 or 2001:db8::/32. Single IPs are upgraded to /32 or /128; host bits are zeroed.
triageExclusions.valueUriHelper: Exact match; trimmed of leading/trailing whitespace.
triageExclusions.valueDomainHelper: Regex pattern (Rust ∩ JS intersection grammar). Patterns that reduce to a hostname suffix or exact match are applied retroactively.
triageExclusions.domainPreviewSuffix: Reduces to suffix {suffix} (subdomains only — bare host left untouched).
triageExclusions.domainPreviewExactOrSuffix: Reduces to exact-or-suffix {suffix} — bare host and any subdomain are removed.
triageExclusions.domainPreviewFullRegex: Full-regex-only — applies to future pipeline passes only. Past corpus rows are unchanged.
triageExclusions.deleteConfirm: Delete this exclusion? Future pipeline passes only — past corpus rows are unchanged.
triageExclusions.deniedGlobal: You do not have permission to manage global exclusions.
triageExclusions.deniedCustomer: You do not have permission to manage customer exclusions.
